policy_statement: Miami-Dade County will cut communitywide greenhouse gas emissions 50% by 2030 from 2019 levels, and achieve net zero by 2050.
verbatim_text:
this plan describes work taking place on multiple fronts to cut MiamiDade's greenhouse gas emissions 50 percent by 2030 from 2019 levels,  with  the  goal  of  achieving  net  zero  by  2050.

This pledge is mobilizing communities to swiftly enact measures to reduce GHG emissions 50% by 2030 compared to 2019 levels and then progress forward to achieve net zero by 2050.
has_quantifiable_target: Yes — '50% by 2030 (from 2019)'; net zero by 2050
has_binding_mechanism: No (County commitment / pledge; not presented as a legally binding ordinance in the excerpt)
has_spatial_specificity: Yes — Miami-Dade County (communitywide)
extraction_rationale: Clear, numerical community target and repeated as the Strategy's core goal (quantifiable target). It is a stated County commitment (Race to Zero pledge) and frames the Strategy.

policy_statement: Benchmark 1.3 billion square feet of communitywide buildings by 2026.
verbatim_text: BENCHMARK 1.3 BILLION SQUARE FEET COMMUNITYWIDE BY 2026
has_quantifiable_target: Yes — Benchmark 1.3 billion sq ft by 2026
has_binding_mechanism: No (target stated; implementation actions described elsewhere but no legal mechanism specified in the line itself)
has_spatial_specificity: Yes — communitywide (Miami-Dade County)
extraction_rationale: Explicit, numerical target for building benchmarking (quantifiable target and specific intervention).

policy_statement: Retrofit 167,500 homes (prioritizing LMI households) to reduce energy costs by 28% by 2030.

has_quantifiable_target: Yes — Retrofit 167,500 homes to reduce energy costs 28% by 2030
has_binding_mechanism: No (stated target and prioritization; not shown as a legal mandate)
has_spatial_specificity: Yes — communitywide (Miami-Dade County), prioritizing Low- to Moderate-Income (LMI) homes
extraction_rationale: Specific numerical retrofit target and performance outcome for homes, prioritized for LMI households (quantifiable target + equity focus).

policy_statement: Install 61,725 kW of solar energy by 2030 on County buildings, land, and water.
verbatim_text: INSTALL 61,725 KW OF SOLAR ENERGY BY 2030 ON COUNTY BUILDINGS, LAND, AND WATER EQUIVALENT TO 7,498 HOMES' ELECTRICITY USE FOR ONE YEAR
has_quantifiable_target: Yes — Install 61,725 kW on County buildings/land/water by 2030
has_binding_mechanism: No (targeted installations and program participation; specific financing/programs are proposed elsewhere but not a binding law in this line)
has_spatial_specificity: Yes — on County buildings, land, and water (Miami-Dade County)
extraction_rationale: Solar-installation capacity targets are explicit numeric commitments distinguishing County assets from commercial/residential (quantifiable targets and specific interventions).

policy_statement: Install 794,000 kW of solar energy by 2030 on commercial and residential buildings.
verbatim_text: INSTALL 794,000 KW OF SOLAR ENERGY BY 2030 ON COMMERCIAL AND RESIDENTIAL BUILDINGS EQUIVALENT TO 104,014 HOMES' ELECTRICITY USE FOR ONE YEAR
has_quantifiable_target: Yes — Install 794,000 kW on commercial and residential buildings by 2030
has_binding_mechanism: No (target for installations across commercial and residential buildings; not presented as regulatory requirement)
has_spatial_specificity: Yes — commercial and residential buildings across Miami-Dade County (communitywide)
extraction_rationale: Large commercial/residential solar capacity target (quantifiable target and sectoral specificity).

policy_statement: Reduce the energy use intensity of new buildings 20% by 2030 below 2020 levels.
verbatim_text: REDUCE THE ENERGY USE INTENSITY OF NEW BUILDINGS 20% BY 2030 BELOW 2020 LEVELS
has_quantifiable_target: Yes — Reduce EUI of new buildings 20% by 2030 below 2020 levels
has_binding_mechanism: No (stated performance target; other text indicates County programs to require ULE for County buildings but this line is a target)
has_spatial_specificity: Yes — new buildings in Miami-Dade County (communitywide/new construction)
extraction_rationale: Clear numerical energy-performance target for new buildings (quantifiable target and specific intervention towards efficiency).

policy_statement: All new County buildings will be Ultra-Low Energy (ULE) by 2030.
verbatim_text: All new County buildings will be Ultra-Low Energy by 2030
has_quantifiable_target: Yes — all new County buildings will be Ultra-Low Energy by 2030 (performance standard)
has_binding_mechanism: Yes — County policy/administrative requirement (statement: 'All new County buildings will be Ultra-Low Energy by 2030')
has_spatial_specificity: Yes — County-owned new buildings (Miami-Dade County government operations)
extraction_rationale: Direct County-level commitment that requires County construction to meet a specific standard (specific intervention and County-level administrative requirement).

policy_statement: Adopt a Building Performance Ordinance to ensure benchmarking and retuning of large existing buildings community-wide.

has_quantifiable_target: No (the ordinance is a binding mechanism; the benchmarking/retuning targets are separate items already captured)

policy_statement: Electrify the County fleet: 80% of light vehicles and 50% of public transit buses by 2030.
verbatim_text: ELECTRIFY THE COUNTY FLEET: 80% OF LIGHT VEHICLES AND 50% OF PUBLIC TRANSIT BUSES BY 2030
has_quantifiable_target: Yes — 80% of light vehicles and 50% of public transit buses electrified by 2030

policy_statement: Transition 30% of communitywide vehicles to electric power by 2030.

policy_statement: Reduce greenhouse gas emissions from Miami International Airport and PortMiami operations by 50% and 25%, respectively, by 2030.
verbatim_text: REDUCE GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS FROM MIAMI INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT AND PORTMIAMI OPERATIONS BY 50% AND 25%, RESPECTIVELY BY 2030

has_spatial_specificity: Yes — Miami International Airport and PortMiami operations (within Miami-Dade County)
extraction_rationale: Clear numeric targets to cut emissions from two major transport hubs (quantifiable target; sector-specific).

policy_statement: Increase community-wide tree canopy to 30% coverage by 2030.
verbatim_text: INCREASE COMMUNITY-WIDE TREE CANOPY TO 30% COVERAGE BY 2030.  [COMMUNITY RECOMMENDATION ]
has_quantifiable_target: Yes — Increase community-wide tree canopy to 30% coverage by 2030

has_spatial_specificity: Yes — communitywide (Miami-Dade County)
extraction_rationale: Explicit urban canopy target (quantifiable target and communitywide natural-asset objective).

policy_statement: Ensure County facilities within the UDB attain at least 30% canopy cover and County facilities outside the UDB attain at least 50% canopy coverage by 2030.
verbatim_text: ENSURE THAT ALL COUNTY FACILITIES WITHIN THE URBAN DEVELOPMENT BOUNDARY (UDB) (PER 2013 DELINEATION) SHALL ATTAIN AN AVERAGE OF AT LEAST 30% CANOPY COVERAGE AND ALL COUNTY FACILITIES OUTSIDE THE UDB SHALL ATTAIN AN AVERAGE OF AT LEAST 50% CANOPY COVERAGE BY 2030
has_quantifiable_target: Yes — County facilities within UDB: at least 30% canopy; outside UDB: at least 50% canopy — by 2030
has_binding_mechanism: Yes — the sentence uses 'ENSURE ... SHALL ATTAIN', indicating an administrative/required standard for County facilities (implies binding County policy)
has_spatial_specificity: Yes — County facilities within and outside the Urban Development Boundary in Miami-Dade County
extraction_rationale: Specific County-facility canopy coverage targets (quantifiable and spatially differentiated requirement for County facilities).
